overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an urban Los Santos environment. The character travels along covered sidewalks, crosses a brick-paved intersection, passes a taco truck, and is ultimately struck by a car. The setting features commercial buildings, palm trees, and moderate traffic under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with closed shops

events.description: passing under the tequi-la-la sign marking the entrance to the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past shops with metal security grates and movie posters

entered.detail: wooden slat awning providing shade over the sidewalk
closed metal roll-down security doors on storefronts
posters and advertisements plastered on the shop walls
black awning with white text reading TEQUI-LA-LA
tall distinctive art deco style tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered commercial sidewalk sheltered by a wooden slat awning. Closed shops with metal security grates line the left side, while the street is visible to the right. The character passes under the Tequi-La-La sign as the art deco tower becomes visible ahead.

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open intersection with full sky visibility
begins crossing the brick-paved intersection as vehicles pass by on the right

agents.ego_description: steps off the curb and crosses the brick-paved intersection toward the art deco tower

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: red brick paved pedestrian crosswalk area
tall pole with traffic signals at the intersection corner
low-rise commercial structures across the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character enters a sunlit urban intersection. The art deco tower dominates the view ahead as the character crosses the brick-paved crosswalk. A black sedan drives through the intersection on the right as the character makes the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside multi-story motel and parking area

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues along the street
passing by a large tour bus and luxury cars parked along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking along the cracked sidewalk past parked vehicles and a large white motel building

entered.detail: large white multi-story building with green trim and multiple balconies
line of parked high-end vehicles including sports cars
large blue and white tour bus parked at the curb
large blue industrial dumpster on the sidewalk
food truck visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a cracked concrete sidewalk beside a large white motel building. The character passes a tour bus and several parked luxury cars, with a blue dumpster visible on the sidewalk. The art deco tower fades into the left background as a taco truck becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with food truck and active traffic

events.description: approaching the Attack-A-Taco food truck with customers gathered nearby
character is struck by a black sports car and knocked to the ground

agents.ego_description: walking past the taco truck and parked cars before being hit by a black sports car

notable_agents.action: two people standing near the taco truck ordering food
black sports car accelerating and striking the character

entered.detail: yellow and white food truck with ATTACK-A-TACO branding
yellow delivery truck with PILSNER branding
large tree providing shade over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Attack-A-Taco food truck where two pedestrians are standing. The character continues along the sidewalk past a Pilsner delivery truck and under tree canopy. Suddenly, a black sports car accelerates from the right and strikes the character, knocking them to the ground next to a parked vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered commercial walkway to a chaotic street encounter. It begins beneath a wooden slat awning, passing closed shops with metal security grates and a Tequi-La-La sign as an art deco tower emerges in the distance. As the character emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a bright, brick-paved intersection where a black sedan passes by while the character crosses toward a large white motel. The camera then follows the character along a cracked concrete sidewalk past a tour bus and luxury cars, with the art deco tower fading into the background as a taco truck comes into view. Finally, after passing the food truck and a delivery vehicle under a leafy tree canopy, a black sports car suddenly accelerates from the right and strikes the character, knocking them to the ground.
